title: capnorchis roylei
intro: Capnorchis roylei is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Himalayan region, scientifically classified as a member of the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Capnorchis roylei include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of coughs and colds, while also possessing potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and powdered, then used in various formulations, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
